note: Promo angles for the tweet generator. Each feature has a url + hook the LLM turns into varied tweets. Never repeat wording; the generator rotates and dedupes.

features.name: Dress / fitting room
features.hook: drag-and-drop dressing room, equip wearables and full sets on your gotchis in real time across up to 3 wallets, with a Catwalk mode to show off looks

features.name: Wardrobe Lab auto-dress
features.hook: an auto-dress optimizer that suggests wearable loadouts to max your traits and BRS. the official dapp has nothing like it. (early preview)

features.name: Explorer / Baazaar
features.hook: one explorer for every Aavegotchi asset on Base, gotchis, wearables, parcels, installations, tiles, portals, forge items, plus buy straight from the on-chain Baazaar

features.name: Bulk transfer + bulk list
features.hook: select a bunch of gotchis and move them in a single transaction, or stage and list many for rent at once. power-user stuff the official UI makes painful

features.name: Pulse
features.hook: State of the Aavegotchiverse, daily GHST + marketplace health metrics with transparent health verdicts (price, volume, buyers, holders). nothing else surfaces this

features.name: Kinship & XP Leaderboard
features.hook: live kinship and XP leaderboards, see the most loved and most experienced gotchis on Base. the dapp doesn't show this

features.name: Steward estate automation
features.hook: keep your whole estate maintained in one click, pet every gotchi, channel every parcel, empty every reservoir. fully non-custodial, you pay only your own gas

features.name: Talk to your Gotchi (AI)
features.hook: chat with an AI persona of any gotchi, built from its real on-chain traits. no wallet needed, fully shareable

features.name: Roast Arena
features.hook: pit two gotchis head to head in a public roast battle. no wallet, pure shareable chaos

features.name: DAO + Live Quorum
features.hook: see your total voting power plus a live quorum panel, DAO-wide votable VP vs quorum pulled live from Snapshot, with proposal progress bars

features.name: Lending marketplace
features.hook: browse Aavegotchi rentals with real filters, BRS-with-wearables, duration, price, channelling, whitelist

features.name: Lending analytics
features.hook: full rental analytics, heatmaps, distributions, leaderboards, address drill-downs and a suggested-price tool

features.name: Auto-renew rentals
features.hook: manage your listings and earnings, with hands-off auto-renew so your rentals keep earning

features.name: Land Management
features.hook: claim, channel, survey and build your Gotchiverse parcels from one panel

features.name: Forge
features.hook: smelt wearables into Forge materials and claim forged items, all signed in your own wallet

features.name: GLTR Staking
features.hook: stake LP on Base and earn GLTR to speed up the Forge

features.name: Get GHST
features.hook: swap, bridge or buy GHST on Base in one place

features.name: Game Center
features.hook: a community directory of Aavegotchi games, tools and dashboards. any gotchi owner can submit their build

features.name: Megaphone content engine
features.hook: auto-generates Aavegotchi videos from live on-chain data and can auto-post them to X, Telegram and YouTube. near-zero cost content engine (prototype)

features.name: Soul / SoulSeal
features.hook: seal and verify a gotchi's Soul, a certificate that follows it around the app. a GotchiCloset original

features.name: Rarity Score explainer
features.hook: understand exactly how rarity score is built from traits, wearables and set bonuses

features.name: Sets library
features.hook: every wearable set with trait bonuses, requirements, and a live preview on your own gotchi

features.name: Wearables encyclopedia
features.hook: every wearable with trait modifiers, slot info and build ideas

features.name: Traits guide
features.hook: learn what each trait does and which wearables and sets boost it

features.name: Marketplace Stats
features.hook: settled Baazaar and auction volume across the whole marketplace on Base

features.name: Activity feed
features.hook: live feed of Baazaar sales, offers and auctions across the marketplace

features.name: Multi-wallet + view any address
features.hook: add up to 3 wallets or paste any 0x address and browse, dress and analyze read-only. no connect required

crossCutting: runs on Base, reading live on-chain data for every feature
free, no fees, community-built. never custodies your assets, everything is signed in your own wallet
does a pile of things the official dapp doesn't: auto-dress optimizer, pulse health verdicts, kinship + XP leaderboard, live quorum, soul sealing, estate automation, and a content engine
subgraph failover keeps data live even when the community subgraph degrades
wallet-free public pages built to share: talk to your gotchi, roast arena
SEO-grade reference library for every trait, wearable and set
voiceRules: casual, gotchi-native, a little playful. lowercase gm energy is fine.
no em dashes. no hashtag spam (0-2 max). 1 emoji max, often none.
under 260 chars so a link fits. never salesy or corporate.
each tweet must be different from every prior tweet. vary the angle, opener, and structure.
when tweeting about a community build, be supportive and never overclaim what it does.
